title: Add a closing sentence to chapter 11 (Glossary) noting term additions come from real usage
acceptance_criteria: site/src/content/guide/11-glossary.mdx gains a short closing paragraph (1 sentence) stating that terms are added as they come up in real usage, not speculatively.
The existing glossary entries and their order are preserved unchanged.
The site builds successfully with `npm run build` in site/.
Only site/src/content/guide/11-glossary.mdx is modified; no other files touched.
definition_of_done: One new closing sentence added; site builds; diff is a single file.
